note: Targeted PR Freelance scrape, 7-day window. Focuses on companies hiring PR/comms where Mark can pitch the fractional alternative. All leads scored 55+. Deduplicated against pr-freelance-scrape-2026-04-30/05-01/05-04/05-05 and daily-scrape-2026-05-01/04/05.

leads.name: Tide
signals: Active 'Head of Communications' job posting
Posting describes 'high profile FinTech startup' — explicit senior PR need
Greenhouse careers board live with multiple comms roles
Fastest-growing UK SMB fintech — strong PR runway
leads.notes: PITCH: Interim Head of Communications during their search, OR fractional advisor for US media expansion. UK companies tend to be more open to US-based contractors than typical US postings.

leads.name: Slash Financial
signals: $100M Series C just closed — brand-new unicorn
Funding Round of the Month for May 2026
Post-Series-C is peak PR moment for amplification + thought leadership
Existing PR resourcing unclear — opening for fractional senior counsel
leads.notes: PITCH: 90-day post-Series-C comms sprint — unicorn announcement amplification, 5-10 tier-1 placements, founder thought leadership. Convert to retainer.

leads.name: Upgrade
leads.industry: Fintech / Consumer credit (cards, personal loans, auto)
signals: 'Newly established' Communication Director position — first dedicated comms leader
Profitable mid-stage fintech — has budget for outside help while searching
Newly-established role = highest-leverage fractional advisory moment
leads.notes: PITCH: 'Fractional Comms Advisor — bridge to your Director hire.' 3-6 month engagement to set up the function and de-risk the search, then convert to ongoing advisory.

leads.name: Turnkey
leads.fundingStage: Series B ($30M, led by Bain Capital Crypto)
signals: $30M Series B led by Bain Capital Crypto + Sequoia, Galaxy, Lightspeed Faction, Wintermute, Variant
Capital explicitly earmarked for marketing team growth
Currently 35 employees — too small for in-house senior PR
Ex-Coinbase founders = strong existing media network to amplify
leads.notes: PITCH: 6-month developer-focused PR contract — earned media in CoinDesk, The Block, Fortune Crypto + founder thought leadership on wallet security and on-chain UX. Quarterly retainer afterwards.

leads.name: Versana
leads.industry: Fintech / Loan data infrastructure (BSL + private credit)
signals: $43M raise from BNP Paribas (lead) + Apollo + MassMutual Ventures + Motive Partners + Fitch Ventures
Live with Morgan Stanley-agented BSL deals
Industry-backed digital infra for $9T BSL + private credit market
Existing PR via Forefront Communications — budget already allocated
leads.notes: PITCH: 'Specialist private-credit/BSL trade-press retainer' — Mark covers Reuters LPC, GlobalCapital, Private Debt Investor while Forefront keeps general brand work. Warm path through Forefront.

leads.name: Kashable
leads.industry: Fintech / Workplace credit + employee financial wellness
leads.fundingStage: Series C ($60M, April 27 2026 — Goldman Sachs Alternatives lead)
signals: $60M Series C led by Sustainable Investing at Goldman Sachs Alternatives ($50M commitment)
Revolution Ventures + EJF Ventures participating
$450M+ total raised since 2013, profitable, 40%+ YoY growth
4M+ employees across 600+ employers — needs HR-trade + fintech-trade press dual track
leads.notes: PITCH: Dual-track post-Series-C campaign — Goldman investment story for finance press + workplace-credit narrative for HR Dive, Benefits Pro, SHRM. 90-day sprint to retainer.
